case_title: 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. VS. MICHAEL KARSH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: FILING AMENDED PLAINTIFFS CLAIM UPDATING AMOUNT OF CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 REALTY CORP.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD; MOVED - NO FWD ON FILE) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FREMON-AQUADO, VIRGINIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-06-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARSH, MICHAEL
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-15-2017 AT 3:30PM
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KARSH, MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.67 FILED BY 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KARSH, MICHAEL FREMON-AQUADO, VIRGINIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,988.22 FILED BY 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KARSH, MICHAEL FREMON-AQUADO, VIRGINIE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-15-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 REALTY CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-15-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR RESOLUTION TO RENT BOARD HEARING. PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY THOMAS IVBUI, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL KARSH APPEARED. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES DEFENDANT VIRGINIE FREMON-AQUADO. PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO DELETE 406-10-12 REALTY CORP AS PLAINTIFF AND ADD THOMAS IVELI AS SOLE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
